overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city at night, starting on a wet multi-lane street, turning at an intersection, passing under an elevated highway with red neon lights, and continuing into a desert wasteland alongside a building with large digital billboards. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) featuring atmospheric haze, neon lighting, and futuristic urban architecture transitioning to open desert.

events.description: parked car on the right starts moving and drives past the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right side of the wet asphalt road

notable_agents.action: dark sedan pulls away from the curb and drives past on the right

entered.detail: wet multi-lane road with double yellow dividing lines reflecting street lights
tall street light illuminating the road ahead with orange glow
tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible through the haze
dark colored sedan parked on the roadside with brake lights on

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet multi-lane city street at night, with the camera walking forward along the road. A parked car on the right starts moving and drives past. Street lights cast an orange glow on the asphalt, while distant skyscrapers are visible through the hazy night air.

events.description: camera turns right at the intersection, changing direction from straight to right

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection while continuing to walk

notable_agents.action: blue car drives through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: road intersection with curved concrete sidewalk on the right
elevated highway overpass visible ahead with support pillars

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at an intersection, revealing an overpass structure ahead. A blue car passes through the intersection from the left. The road curves to the right, and the sidewalk becomes visible on the right side as the camera approaches the overpass.

events.description: approaching the overpass structure, entering the sheltered area beneath

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved concrete sidewalk toward the overpass pillars

entered.detail: curved concrete pavement with raised curb along the edge
large rectangular concrete support columns for the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along a curved concrete sidewalk, approaching the massive concrete pillars of an overpass. The sky becomes mostly obscured by the elevated highway structure above. Palm trees line the left side as the ground transitions from asphalt to paved walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path under elevated highway with red neon lighting

events.description: ground surface changes from concrete sidewalk to dirt and gravel
red neon lights under the overpass become prominent, casting red glow on the dirt ground

agents.ego_description: walking forward on dirt ground under the overpass, passing between concrete pillars

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and gravel surface with sparse weeds and patches of grass
array of red neon tube lights mounted underneath the overpass deck
massive illuminated digital screen displaying weapon advertisements in red and white
tall modern building with multiple digital screens and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions to dirt as the camera moves under the overpass. Red neon lights mounted under the highway deck cast a vivid red glow on the surroundings. Large digital billboards on a nearby building display bright advertisements, becoming the dominant visual feature on the right side as the camera walks between concrete support pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert wasteland alongside commercial building

events.description: exiting the covered area under the overpass into open desert wasteland

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward past the billboards into the open desert area with sparse vegetation

entered.detail: joshua trees and desert bushes scattered across the dirt landscape
dark night sky visible above the desert horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered overpass area into an open desert wasteland. The large digital billboards and commercial building now appear on the left side as the camera passes them. The ground remains dirt with scattered desert vegetation like joshua trees, and the night sky is fully visible above the distant city lights on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked cyberpunk city street into a desolate desert wasteland. It begins by walking forward along a wet multi-lane road under an orange glow, passing a moving car as distant skyscrapers loom through the hazy night air. As the camera turns right at an intersection, the road curves toward a massive overpass, shifting from the open street to a paved sidewalk lined with palm trees. The scene then transitions under the concrete highway structure, where the lighting shifts to a vivid red neon glow and large digital billboards on a nearby building become the dominant visual focus. Finally, the camera exits the covered area as the ground turns to dirt, leaving the commercial buildings behind to reveal an open desert landscape dotted with joshua trees under a clear night sky.
